name: agentforge-monorepo
description: AgentForge — Kubernetes for AI agent workflows

scripts.build:dashboard: cd packages/core/src/dashboard/app && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:ts && npm run build:assets
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/core/dist packages/core/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/core/src/dashboard/dist packages/platform/dist packages/platform/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
